response.original_title: Megan pees in a cup while driving
response.overview: My girlfriend and I were on our way to a wedding in Seattle but we live in Portland and we were running late but she has a bladder that for some reason won't hold an ounce once she enters the car. We were almost there and she had to pee (again) but there wasn't anywhere to pull over and get a bathroom she started to freak out and asked me what she could do. I told her I've peed in the car while driving before into a Starbucks cup and it worked pretty well as a stopgap. She eagerly jumped into the back seat and filled a venti. I filmed it over my shoulder while driving that's why it's vertical and so shaky. I got her permission to post it on YouTube and Reddit. I let her know every few days how many thousands of people have watched her pee in my car. She thinks it's hilarious. What a keeper!
response.title: Megan pees in a cup while driving
